content: Lydia: By Diabella's tits, this mine reeks of bandit filth and stale mead. Bet they were fucking those mangy wolves they keep as pets before we slaughtered them. Rica: Oh aye, saw a pair of em going at it near the ore pile. Stupid beasts got so distracted, my axe split both their skulls mid-thrust. Your thane's got finer tastes though, eh? That Serana slut still stealing your turn in his bedroll? Lydia: That pasty vampire cunt couldn't satisfy a skeever. MJR needs a real Nord woman who can take his cock properly - none of that fanged twat's necromancer tricks. Rica: Hah! Heard you squealing last time he took you over the Jarl's war table. traditional Nord submission
Lydia: Aye, and I'd bend over that table again in a heartbeat if it pleased my Thane.
